title: Recrafted
body:
# Recrafted

This mod makes the most of Minecraft by adding blocks for a variety of obscure or difficult-to-use textures that are already in-game. The textures are resource pack compatible as well. Some mods I recommend using along with this mod are Immersive Weathering by astralordana, and Framed Blocks by XFactHD. There are no plans for making a Fabric version of this mod in the future.

## How to obtain non-craftable blocks:

- Azalea and grass growths can be obtained by shearing grass blocks, azaleas, and azalea grass.

- Path turf and farmland turf can be obtained by flattening and tilling regular turf. Right click a moist farmland turf with a water bottle to moisten it

- Eroded deepslate can be obtained by scraping deepslate with a pickaxe. Inscribed stone can be obtained by scraping inset stone with a pickaxe.

- Cracking ice can be obtained by right clicking ice with a pickaxe. Right clicking it multiple times will continue to crack it until it breaks, however when it is broken through cracking it will not leave water behind.

- Raw mushroom can be obtained by scraping any vanilla mushroom block with an axe.

- Oiled wood can be obtained by right clicking dark oak planks with an ink sac.

- Polished wood and polished stone can be obtained by waxing birch planks and stone respectively.
